name: moltbot-vllm
description: Moltbot AI assistant with vLLM for local LLM inference. Includes Telegram integration.
readme:
# Moltbot + vLLM

AI coding assistant with local LLM inference.

## Quick Start
1. Set TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN env var (get from @BotFather)
2. Start the pod - services auto-start
3. Message your bot on Telegram
4. First time: approve pairing via SSH: `moltbot pairing list telegram` then `moltbot pairing approve telegram CODE --notify`

## Persistence
- Config & pairings stored in /workspace/.clawdbot (legacy path used by Moltbot)
- Model cache in /workspace/huggingface

## Environment Variables
- `MODEL_NAME`: HuggingFace model ID
- `TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN`: Your Telegram bot token
- `VLLM_API_KEY`: API key for vLLM
- `MAX_MODEL_LEN`: Context length

## Ports
- 8000: vLLM API
- 18789: Moltbot Gateway
